identity.descriptionZh: Spotify 的 Design.md 主题展示，围绕媒体内容、暗色界面、强视觉、消费品牌组织页面。
identity.descriptionEn: Music streaming. Vibrant green on dark, bold type, album-art-driven.

display.description: Spotify 的 Design.md 主题展示，围绕媒体内容、暗色界面、强视觉、消费品牌组织页面。
display.descriptionEn: Music streaming. Vibrant green on dark, bold type, album-art-driven.

shadows.label: 阴影 1 - Shadow 1
shadows.description: What distinguishes Spotify is its pill-and-circle geometry. Primary buttons use 500px–9999px radius (full pill), circular play buttons use 50% radius, and search inputs are 500px pills. Combined with heavy shadows (`rgba(0,0,0,0.5) 0px 8px 24px`) on elevated elements and a unique inset border-shadow combo (`rgb(18,18,18) 0px 1px 0px, rgb(124,124,124) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset`), the result is an interface that feels like a premium audio device — tactile, rounded, and built for touch.

shadows.label: 阴影 2 - Shadow 2
shadows.description: What distinguishes Spotify is its pill-and-circle geometry. Primary buttons use 500px–9999px radius (full pill), circular play buttons use 50% radius, and search inputs are 500px pills. Combined with heavy shadows (`rgba(0,0,0,0.5) 0px 8px 24px`) on elevated elements and a unique inset border-shadow combo (`rgb(18,18,18) 0px 1px 0px, rgb(124,124,124) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset`), the result is an interface that feels like a premium audio device — tactile, rounded, and built for touch.

borders.label: 边框 1 - Border 1
borders.description: What distinguishes Spotify is its pill-and-circle geometry. Primary buttons use 500px–9999px radius (full pill), circular play buttons use 50% radius, and search inputs are 500px pills. Combined with heavy shadows (`rgba(0,0,0,0.5) 0px 8px 24px`) on elevated elements and a unique inset border-shadow combo (`rgb(18,18,18) 0px 1px 0px, rgb(124,124,124) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset`), the result is an interface that feels like a premium audio device — tactile, rounded, and built for touch.

borders.label: 边框 2 - Border 2
borders.description: Border Gray (`#4d4d4d`): Button borders on dark

borders.label: 边框 3 - Border 3
borders.description: Light Border (`#7c7c7c`): Outlined button borders, muted links

borders.label: 边框 4 - Border 4
borders.description: Silver (`#b3b3b3`): Secondary text, muted labels, inactive nav

borders.label: 边框 5 - Border 5
borders.description: Spotify Green Border (`#1db954`): Green accent border variant

panels.title: 第一眼识别明确
panels.body: 适合消费品牌、电商、媒体和产品展示页。

panels.title: 颜色与字体可复用
panels.body: 页面从本地 metadata 与 Design.md 提取 palette、typography 和标签，用于快速预览主题质感。

panels.title: 面向真实界面片段
panels.body: 按钮、输入、卡片和间距样例保持克制，便于比较不同主题的系统性差异。

do: 建议：Use near-black backgrounds ({#121212}–{#1f1f1f}) — depth through shade variation。
建议：Apply Spotify Green ({#1ed760}) only for play controls, active states, and primary CTAs。
建议：Use pill shape (500px–9999px) for all buttons — circular (50%) for play controls。
建议：Apply uppercase + wide letter-spacing (1.4px–2px) on button labels。
建议：Keep typography compact (10px–24px range) — this is an app, not a magazine。
dont: 避免：use Spotify Green decoratively or on backgrounds — it's functional only。
避免：use light backgrounds for primary surfaces — the dark immersion is core。
避免：skip the pill/circle geometry on buttons — square buttons break the identity。
避免：use thin/subtle shadows — on dark backgrounds, shadows need to be heavy to be visible。
避免：add additional brand colors — green + achromatic grays is the complete palette。
